rows.label: qev041305_MSG0001
rows.name:
Heheh... this ominous card...
It stimulates my revoltant desires...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0002
rows.name:
There are many venomous-looking things
in the Mira Animal Collection, and even a Zaruboggan
like me gets my collector's urge stimulated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0003
rows.name:
Excuse me, do you not happen
to have an Aranea card?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0004
rows.name:
...I see, you do not have one.
Well, then it cannot be helped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0005
rows.name:
There are many venomous-looking things
in the Mira Animal Collection, and even a Zaruboggan
like me gets my collector's urge stimulated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0006
rows.name:
Excuse me, do you not happen
to have an Aranea card?
The other day, I obtained a Suid's...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Would you trade it for these bones?
I am sorry, I do not have any cards, you see.
However, this has a nice weight to it, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0008
rows.name:
What an incredibly ominous card...
Ah, I want to become completely revoltant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Thank you very much.
Please, accept these Suid Bones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041305_MSG0010
rows.name:
Is that so...
If you change your mind,
please do speak to me.[ST:wait ]
